name: French Apple Dessert
recipeIngredient: 6 cups thinly sliced, peeled tart apples
3 egg whites or 1/2 cup cholesterol-free egg product
1/4 cup Bisquick Reduced Fat baking mix
1 cup Bisquick Reduced Fat baking mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 13x9x2-inch (baking dish).
Prepare the streusel mixture and set aside.
Spread the apples in the prepared baking dish.
2. In a blender, blend together remaining ingredients on high speed for 15 seconds.
With a hand beater or wire whisk, beat the mixture for an additional minute
until smooth. Pour over the apples and sprinkle with streusel.
3. Bake for about 55 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
Allow to cool for at least 10 minutes before serving. Serves 12-15.
